metadata.description: INFYNON Security Suite — Package security manager, network firewall, and API testing plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: infynon-pkg
plugins.description: INFYNON Package Security Manager — Universal secure package installation, CVE scanning, auto-fix, dependency auditing, and vulnerability monitoring across 14 ecosystems

plugins.name: infynon-firewall
plugins.description: INFYNON Network Firewall — Real-time reverse proxy WAF with TUI dashboard, multi-stage pipeline, rate limiting, IP filtering, and email alerts

plugins.name: infynon-weave
plugins.description: INFYNON Weave — AI-driven node-based API flow testing, security probes, TUI visualization, assertion engine, and automated flow building. CLI: infynon weave
